selected_items.item_description: Deep charcoal navy single-breasted tailored blazer in smooth structured suiting fabric, regular tailored fit, notched lapel, long sleeves, hip-length, solid dark neutral finish.
Pale blush peach long-sleeve pussy-bow peplum blouse in lightweight smooth woven fabric, relaxed upper fit with gathered waist, tie-neck collar, flared gathered cuffs, solid pastel warm tone.
Dark charcoal gray tailored pleated tapered trousers in smooth suiting fabric, structured waistband, ankle-to-full length, solid muted neutral color.
Warm nude beige pointed-toe stiletto pumps with smooth leather-like sheen, low-cut vamp, closed pointed toe, slim high heel, solid neutral finish.

styling_advice: baju_images (2) defines the waist with its peplum, improving the straight rectangular silhouette, while baju_18826877e271f9d16730d0459614093c adds clean shoulder structure without bulk. baju_pngtree-elegant-black-pants-on-a-wooden-hanger-against-neutral-wall-perfect-png-image_14911870 replaces excess lower-body volume with a sharper tapered line, and baju_images (7) visually lengthens the legs for formal polish.
